candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When 30-indicator conviction is 100% but green_matches is 0 and hist_hr is 0%, the consensus is a live-only phantom with no historical analog and must be sized to zero, not full conviction.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A 100% live conviction with zero green_matches means no historical instance of this exact indicator configuration has ever resolved profitably — the system is extrapolating into a state space it has never observed. Institutionally this happens when a crowded one-directional flow (all indicators agree) coincides with a structural break (e.g. USDJPY LONG at 8/30 bull, 0 green_matches, hist_hr=0%): everyone is on the same side precisely because a regime is transitioning, and there is no memory to anchor the edge.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.0  # freeze, treat as UNRELIABLE
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Removes zero-memory phantom entries (USDJPY LONG, AUDNZD SHORT today both qualify) that dilute Sharpe with noise trades; expected +0.02-0.04 Sharpe by cutting negative-expectancy tails.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live state shows USDJPY dir=LONG conv=67% green_matches=0 hist_hr=0% and AUDNZD dir=SHORT conv=100% green_matches=0 hist_hr=0% — both maximum-conviction signals with zero historical confirmation, contrasted against AUDUSD LONG conv=100% green_matches=3 hist_hr=68% which HAS analog support.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightens USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13; VIX is now 18.77 and rising (16.73→18.77 intraday), which under L8 already vetoes both pairs — verify L8 is actually firing before adding the green_matches gate, or the two rules may be redundant on exactly these pairs.

reflection.system_health_note: Regime is UNKNOWN with zero trades in 7 days and TradingView showing 0 signals — the system is correctly in a low-conviction hold, so any new gate must be validated on historical harvest data since no live decision logs exist yet.
